mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(ss.quantity, sp.quantity, 0) FROM spare_part sp LEFT JOIN spare_part_stock ss ON ss.spare_part_id = sp.id WHERE sp.code = #{partCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_reorder_suggest ( part_code, suggest_month, current_stock, reorder_point, suggest_qty, forecast_qty, lower_bound, upper_bound, urgency, status ) SELECT x.part_code, #{suggestMonth}, x.current_stock, x.reorder_point, x.suggest_qty, x.forecast_qty, ROUND(x.forecast_qty * 0.80, 2), ROUND(x.forecast_qty * 1.25, 2), CASE WHEN x.current_stock <= x.reorder_point - 8 THEN '紧急' ELSE '正常' END, '待处理' FROM ( SELECT sp.code AS part_code, COALESCE(ss.quantity, sp.quantity, 0) AS current_stock, COALESCE(ss.quantity, sp.quantity, 0) + 5 + MOD(CRC32(CONCAT('R', sp.code)), 12) AS reorder_point, 8 + MOD(CRC32(CONCAT('Q', sp.code)), 18) AS suggest_qty, ROUND(6 + MOD(CRC32(CONCAT('F', sp.code)), 24), 2) AS forecast_qty FROM spare_part sp LEFT JOIN spare_part_stock ss ON ss.spare_part_id = sp.id ORDER BY COALESCE(sp.is_critical, 0) DESC, COALESCE(sp.price, 0) DESC LIMIT 30 ) x
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_reorder_suggest SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
